mnemonics.title: Seven IoT Enabling Technologies
mnemonics.content: **WICECBS:** WSN, Identification, Communication, Embedded, Cloud, Big Data, Security — Remember: "Wireless Identification Connects Embedded Clouds with Big Security"

mnemonics.title: Short-Range Protocols
mnemonics.content: **BZW:** BLE (wearables), Zigbee (mesh/home), Wi-Fi (high bandwidth), Z-Wave (home auto) — Remember: "Busy Zebras Walk Zigzag" — all under 100m range

mnemonics.title: LPWAN Long-Range Protocols
mnemonics.content: **LoNg:** LoRaWAN (unlicensed spectrum, smart cities) and NB-IoT (licensed cellular spectrum, utilities) — both reach kilometers with very low power

mnemonics.title: Cloud Service Models
mnemonics.content: **IPS stack:** IaaS (Infrastructure — raw compute), PaaS (Platform — IoT Core/Hub), SaaS (Software — dashboards) — Remember: from bottom (hardware) to top (user-facing)

mnemonics.title: Three V's of Big Data
mnemonics.content: **VVV:** Volume (how much data), Velocity (how fast it arrives), Variety (how many formats) — all three are amplified in IoT due to millions of heterogeneous devices
